hooks.name: Check Environment
hooks.description: Runs setup_env.py to ensure .venv exists, then activates it. Works on macOS/Linux and Windows (cmd).

hooks.name: Load Steering Files
hooks.description: Loads all steering files with inclusion: auto at session start.

action.prompt: Activate the following steering files using the disclose_context tool: api-reference, coding-standards, meta, web-standards, workflow
